title: Gopi Gopika Godavari
overview: Gopi Gopika Godavari is a Telugu-language film released on 10 July 2009. The film, starring Kamalinee Mukherjee, Venu Thottempudi, Krishna Bhagavan and Sana, was directed by Vamsy.  Kamalinee Mukherjee as Gopika  Venu Thottempudi as Gopi  Krishna Bhagavan  Sana  Jayalalitha
